title: corylus americana var. calyculata
intro: Corylus americana var. calyculata, also known as the American hazelnut, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the birch family Betulaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Corylus americana var. calyculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support digestive health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its nuts are also edible, providing a rich source of nutrients and antioxidants.
